eventMetadata.context_description: WTI crude oil (CL) front-month futures plummeted 6.7% to $95.40 per barrel on May 6 amid de-escalation in Strait of Hormuz tensions, as reports of a nearing U.S.-Iran deal prompted President Trump to pause military escort operations, reversing prior surges above $100 driven by shipping disruptions and stranded tankers. The latest EIA report revealed a bullish 6.2 million barrel draw in U.S. commercial inventories to 459.5 million barrels for the week ending April 24, exceeding expectations and tightening supply amid rising refinery utilization. Monthly prices remain down 16%, reflecting demand erosion from elevated energy costs. Traders monitor weekly EIA storage releases starting tomorrow, summer driving season demand ramps, and the OPEC+ ministerial meeting on June 7 for output signals that could sway the market-implied path toward end-June settlement levels.

markets.question: Will Coinbase Global, Inc. (COIN) hit (HIGH) $215 in May?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if, at any point during May 2026, any 1-minute candle for Coinbase Global, Inc. (COIN) has a final "High" price equal to or above the listed price. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

Only prices achieved during the regular trading hours of the primary exchange on which the listed security trades (typically 9:30 AM – 4:00 PM ET) will be considered. Prices occurring during pre-market or after-hours trading will not qualify.

Prices will be used exactly as published by Pyth, without rounding.

In the event of a stock split, reverse stock split, or similar corporate action affecting the listed company during the listed time frame, this market will resolve based on split-adjusted prices as displayed on Pyth.

The target price will be adjusted proportionally to reflect any stock splits. Resolution will be based on the historical price data as shown on Pyth after any adjustments have been applied.

The resolution source for this market is Pyth — specifically, the Coinbase Global, Inc. (COIN) "High" prices available at https://pythdata.app/explore/Equity.US.COIN%2FUSD, with the chart settings configured for 1-minute candles.

Historical 1-minute candles may be accessed by appending a Unix timestamp (seconds) to the Pyth chart URL using the "t=" parameter. Any timestamp within the listed market time frame may be used to view the relevant candle data (e.g., https://pythdata.app/explore/Equity.US.COIN%2FUSD?t=1773432000)

If the relevant Pyth data is unavailable due to a system outage, data failure, or other technical disruption that prevents verification of the required 1-minute candle data, the official daily high price published by the primary exchange on which the listed security trades will be used to determine whether the listed price was reached during the applicable trading session.

events.title: What will Coinbase Global, Inc. (COIN) hit in May 2026?

eventMetadata.context_description: Coinbase Global (COIN) shares hover near $198, buoyed by Bitcoin's surge past $80,000 that lifted the stock over 6% in the latest session amid heightened crypto trading volumes. Q1 2026 earnings due May 7 represent the primary catalyst, with Wall Street consensus projecting EPS of $0.36—down 81% year-over-year—and revenue near $1.5 billion, pressured by softer spot market activity despite 61% growth in stablecoin revenue to $364 million. Analyst targets average $262, reflecting optimism on institutional adoption and regulatory tailwinds, though lawsuits introduce volatility risks. Early in May, macroeconomic risk appetite and post-earnings guidance will dictate share price trajectory toward key thresholds.

markets.question: Will the highest temperature in Lucknow be 45°C or higher on May 8?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the Chaudhary Charan Singh Intl Airport Station in degrees Celsius on 8 May '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the Chaudhary Charan Singh Intl Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/in/lucknow/VILK.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: Indian Meteorological Department observations show Lucknow's maximum temperature on May 5 at just 28°C—11.4°C below normal—amid partly cloudy skies and thundery developments, continuing a rare cool spell after early-May rains suppressed heat. Forecasts for the coming days predict highs around 31°C with isolated thunderstorms, gusty winds, and light rain likely over Uttar Pradesh, limiting solar heating and surface warming. This IMD data drives the 88% market-implied probability for 35°C or below on May 8, reflecting trader consensus on persistent cloud cover and convective activity overriding typical pre-monsoon peaks near 40°C. New model runs or clearing skies could shift odds, with updates expected in IMD's daily bulletins.

markets.question: Spread: Cádiz CF (-2.5)
markets.description:
In the upcoming La Liga 2 game, scheduled for May 8 at 2:30 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Cádiz CF" if Cádiz CF win the game by 3 or more goals.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "RC Deportivo La Coruña".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

This market will resolve according to the official final score published on laliga.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: Cádiz CF vs. RC Deportivo La Coruña - More Markets
events.description: More markets for the La Liga 2 game, scheduled for May 8 at 2:30 PM ET.

eventMetadata.context_description: RC Deportivo La Coruña, entrenched in second place in LaLiga Hypermotion standings with 64 points from a strong run of wins and draws—including a 3-1 victory over Mirandés last weekend and a 1-1 draw at Burgos on April 25—enter Jornada 39 as promotion contenders against relegation-battling Cádiz CF, mired in 18th on 38 points. Cádiz's winless streak over five matches features heavy losses like 3-0 to Sporting Gijón and 3-0 at Real Valladolid, exacerbated by injuries to key attackers Javi Ontiveros (groin), Suso (muscle), and Bojan Kovacevic (knee). The earlier season 2-2 draw at Riazor highlights Cádiz's home fightback potential, but Deportivo's away form and table position drive trader sentiment toward the visitors.

markets.question: Will New England Patriots win the 2026 AFC East?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the team that is declared as the AFC East division champion for the 2026 NFL regular season.

If multiple teams tie atop the division, this market will resolve according to the official tiebreak procedure of the NFL.

If the 2026 NFL regular season is cancelled, postponed after January 17, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, or there is otherwise no winner declared for this division within that timeframe, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from the NFL; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

Parker and CB Davison Igbinosun, bolstering pass rush alongside free-agent addition Bradley Chubb and trade acquisition DJ Moore to support Josh Allen after the Patriots snapped their streak in a 14-3 2025 campaign. New England Patriots hold a competitive 35.5% as defending division champs with QB Drake Maye maturing, trading up for OT Caleb Lomu and EDGE Gabe Jacas to protect the pocket amid a tough schedule. Jets' draft haul (EDGE David Bailey at No. 2) lifts them to 8.5%, while Dolphins' volume picks fail to overcome injury concerns, stranding them at 6.3%.

markets.question: Series: Anyone's Legend Kill Handicap (-10.5) vs Weibo Gaming (+10.5)
markets.description:
This market refers to the LoL match between Anyone's Legend and Weibo Gaming in the LPL Group Ascend, scheduled for January 20 at 4:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Anyone's Legend" if Anyone's Legend secures 11 or more kills than Weibo Gaming in the match. 

Otherwise, it will resolve to "Weibo Gaming".

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.
markets.groupItemTitle: Series: Anyone's Legend Kill Handicap (-10.5) vs Weibo Gaming (+10.5)

events.title: LoL: Anyone's Legend vs Weibo Gaming (BO3) - LPL Group Ascend
events.description:
This market will resolve to "Anyone's Legend" if Anyone's Legend win against Weibo Gaming in the named LoL match in the LPL Group Ascend, scheduled for January 20 at 4:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Weibo Gaming" if Weibo Gaming win against Anyone's Legend in the LoL match.

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.

If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://liquipedia.net/leagueoflegends/Main_Page.

eventMetadata.context_description: Anyone's Legend enters this LPL Group Ascend BO3 with strong trader consensus driven by their third-place standing (7-3 series, 14-7 maps) and five-match win streak, including a dominant 2-0 sweep over Top Esports on May 1 and prior victories against Invictus Gaming. They've owned the head-to-head versus Weibo Gaming this Split 2, winning 2-0 on April 4 and 2-1 on April 25, leveraging Tarzan's jungle pressure and consistent mid-lane carry from Shanks. Weibo Gaming sits mid-table after recent stumbles—a 0-2 loss to TES and 1-2 reverse sweep by IG—highlighting inconsistencies despite veteran core of Xiaohu, Jiejie, and Elk. No major roster changes or injuries reported; outcome hinges on early-game macro and current patch meta favoring aggressive sidelanes.

markets.question: Will Trump say "Darth Vader" in May?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if Donald Trump mentions the listed term between May 1, 2026, 12:00 AM ET and May 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

Plural and possessive forms of the listed term will count toward the resolution of this market regardless of context; however, other forms will NOT count.

Instances where the term is used in a compound word will count regardless of context (e.g. joyful is not a compound word for "joy," however "killjoy" is a compounding of the words "kill" and "joy").

If this market requires a specified number of mentions of a person’s first or last name, a full-name mention will count as one mention (e.g., if a market is about “Joe / Biden 5+ times,” a mention of “Joe Biden” will count once).

A ‘mention’ will include any verbal mention which is recorded (audio or video) and publicly accessible.

Written usages of terms (e.g. Truth Social posts, written statements, etc.) will not count toward this market's resolution.

AI-generated audio or video will not count toward this market's resolution.

Videos posted on his social media which were filmed outside this market's time frame will not qualify for a "Yes" resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: President Trump's recent public remarks, including a May 1 speech at The Villages in Florida labeling criticism of U.S. progress in the Iran conflict as treasonous, May 4 comments at a small business summit referencing his extended tenure, and a May 5 Oval Office signing of a youth sports proclamation, have heightened trader focus on his verbal rhetoric amid escalating tensions with Tehran. His ongoing public feud with Pope Leo XIV over Iran's nuclear program and calls for surrender have fueled expectations of foreign policy terms like ISIS or nuke in speeches, while no outcomes have resolved yet through May 5. With the market tracking verbal mentions until May 31, upcoming rallies, press gaggles, or diplomatic addresses could prompt shifts in trader consensus on specific phrases.

markets.question: Will Kim Jong Un be the next leader out before 2027?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the first individual who ceases to occupy their listed office.

An announcement of a resignation/removal, or a scheduled departure from office due to the outcome of an election, will not alone qualify.

Only permanent removal from office will qualify for resolution. Temporary removals, such as impeachment suspensions (e.g., Yoon Suk Yeol's recent impeachment), temporary invocation of the 25th Amendment, or any similar provisional transfers of power, will not count.

Additionally, if an individual continues in a caretaker or interim role (e.g., Gabriel Attal remaining as caretaker Prime Minister of France), they will not be considered to have ceased occupying the office for the purposes of this market.

If this criterion has not been met for any of the listed individuals by December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to “None before 2027”. No additional individuals will be added to this market after its creation.

The resolution source for this market will be a consensus of credible reporting.

eventMetadata.context_description: Viktor Orbán's landslide defeat in Hungary's April 12, 2026, parliamentary election has driven trader consensus to price him at near-certainty (98.5%) as the next leader out of power before 2027, reflecting his public concession after Péter Magyar's center-right Tisza party secured a two-thirds supermajority amid record turnout. This ends Orbán's 16-year tenure as prime minister, with the president set to convene parliament soon for Magyar's likely swearing-in as early as May 9-10, triggering a standard government transition under Hungary's constitutional process. While skin-in-the-game bets overwhelmingly back this outcome, slim uncertainties like procedural delays, Fidesz legal challenges, or parliamentary holds could theoretically postpone his exit, though the decisive victory minimizes such risks for other leaders like Starmer or Netanyahu.

Islam Makhachev retains the top spot as new welterweight champion, but stalled superfight negotiations—blamed on Topuria's purse demands or Makhachev's injury—fuel the 31.5% "Islam/None" pricing amid his cross-division dominance. Dricus du Plessis's 26.5% reflects middleweight title defenses and P4P climb into top 10, while Jack Della Maddalena's welterweight surge and Petr Yan's bantamweight championship elevate their contention. Recent April cards like Fight Night: Sterling vs. Zalal underscore shifting hierarchies without dethroning Makhachev yet.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus heavily favors Min Hyung-bae at 97.7% implied probability to win the June 3, 2026, inaugural Jeonnam-Gwangju Integrated Special City mayoral election, reflecting the Honam region's longstanding status as a Democratic Party stronghold where opposition People Power Party candidates historically poll below 20-30% amid high progressive turnout. Min, a sitting National Assembly member from Gwangju, unified the Democratic nomination in mid-April after a competitive runoff primary victory over Jeollanam-do Governor Kim Young-rok, consolidating party support without internal fractures. PPP's Lee Jung-hyun, former party chair with regional ties, recently proposed debates on integration and economic issues but faces structural barriers in this deep-blue battleground. Upsets would require a major Min scandal, national political shifts, or anomalous voter mobilization before election day.
